text.title: Opportunity Solution Trees Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Activation-focused OST
example.note: Outcome: W1 activation rate, current 30%, target 45%. Opportunities (3): step-3 onboarding friction (score 12*4*H, delta +2), search latency (score 7*3*M, delta 0), email confirm friction (score 5*2*M, delta -1). Solutions under step-3 opp: '1-click template' (assumption: users will click template if shown at step 3; test=fake_door); 'video walkthrough' (assumption: video reduces abandonment; test=prototype). Kill list this month: 'old chart redesign' (opp_007) - 6 weeks no evidence; 'dark mode toggle' (opp_011) - moved to bug backlog.
